creator: ssb22@cam.ac.uk
text: Sure.  I probably missed a check-box on the form when uploading the `diff.mbox` file (which is plain text, but didn't get automatically recognised as such).  I assumed it was a good idea to use the `.mbox` extension because https://docs.freebsd.org/en/articles/contributing/ says to use `git-format-patch` which produces the mbox format.  On the other hand, the section of the Porters' Handbook it links to says to use `git diff` instead....
